zh.Grangärde, Ludvika, Dalarna, Sweden: 瑞典達拉納盧德維卡格朗亞德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Britta Iversdotter於1482年出生在瑞典烏普薩拉丹馬可時，她的父親Iver Nilsson27歲，母親Okänd Hustru27歲。她和Arfwid Arvid Mattsson至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1572年在她的家鄉享年90歲。

zh-hans.Grangärde, Ludvika, Dalarna, Sweden: 瑞典達拉納盧德維卡格朗亞德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Britta Iversdotter于1482年出生在瑞典烏普薩拉丹馬可时，她的父亲Iver Nilsson27岁，母亲Okänd Hustru27岁。她和Arfwid Arvid Mattsson至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1572年在她的家乡享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: Britta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Borrowing of the Irish name Brighid ( see Bridget ). This name owes its enormous popularity in Scandinavia, especially in Sweden, to St Birgitta ( 1304–73 ), patron saint of Sweden. She was a noblewoman who bore her husband eight children. After his death, she founded an order of nuns, the ‘Bridgettines’ or Order of the Most Holy Saviour. She also went to Rome, where she attempted to reform religious life.

variants.name: Britt
meanings: contracted form of Birgit ( see Bridget ), made famous in the English-speaking world by the Swedish actress Britt Ekland ( b. 1942 ; her surname was originally Eklund ).

historicEvents.title: The Russo-Swedish War
historicEvents.description: While in an alliance with Grand Prince Ivan III of Moscow, King Hans of Denmark and Norway invaded Sweden and was declared King of Sweden.

historicEvents.title: The Stockholm Bloodbath
historicEvents.description: A mass execution of Swedish nobles by Danish king Christian II is known as the Stockholm Bloodbath. Christian II invaded Sweden in 1519 and took hold of Stockholm in September 1520. Over 80 nobles were executed for heresy on November 8 and 9. The outrage from the executions led to the Swedish removal of support of the Kalmar Union.

historicEvents.title: Swedish War of Liberation
historicEvents.description: The Swedish War of Liberation was a civil war led by nobleman Gustav Vasa. As Christian II heard of the rebellion, he confronted Vasa's men, who won the battle at Brunbacks Ferry. Christian II was defeated by the Swedes in Stockholm and a truce was agreed upon. Vasa was given as a hostage as a show of good faith until the treaty was signed. The Danish King did not keep his word and Vasa was held as a prisoner for two years until his escape. A bounty was placed on Vasa's head. Vasa worked to inspire many to join his cause and lived under disguise until the Danes surrendered in 1525.

historicEvents.title: First Full Swedish Translation of the Bible
historicEvents.description: The first full Swedish translation of the Bible, known as the Gustav Bible, was completed by Olaus Petri and Laurentius Andreae and published in 1540.

historicEvents.title: Sweden Becomes Lutheran Nation
historicEvents.description: Sweden officially declared itself a Lutheran nation in 1544.
Peace of Stettin concluded. Denmark recognized independence of Sweden. Sweden gave up claim to Norway.

en.lifeSummary: When Britta Iversdotter was born in 1482, in Danmark, Uppsala, Sweden, her father, Iver Nilsson, was 27 and her mother, Okänd Hustru, was 27. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Arfwid Arvid Mattsson. She died in 1572, in her hometown, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Britta Iversdotter est née en 1482, à Danmark, Uppsala, Suède, son père, Iver Nilsson, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Okänd Hustru, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Arfwid Arvid Mattsson. Elle est décédée en 1572, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Britta Iversdotter 1482 in Danmark, Uppsala, Schweden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Iver Nilsson 27 und ihre Mutter Okänd Hustru 27. Sie hatte mit Arfwid Arvid Mattsson mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1572 im Alter von 90 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Britta Iversdotter è nata il nel 1482 nel Danmark, Uppsala, Svezia, sua padre, Iver Nilsson, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Okänd Hustru, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Arfwid Arvid Mattsson. Morì nel 1572, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Britta Iversdotterが1482年にスウェーデンウップサラダンマークで生まれた時，父Iver Nilssonは27歳，母Okänd Hustruは27歳であった。彼女はArfwid Arvid Mattssonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1572年に故郷で90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Britta Iversdotter(이)가 1482년 스웨덴 업프사라 단아마크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Iver Nilsson(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Okänd Hustru(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Arfwid Arvid Mattsson(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1572년 그녀의 고향에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Britta Iversdotter nasceu em 1482, em Danmark, Uppsala, Suécia, seu pai, Iver Nilsson, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Okänd Hustru, tinha 27 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Arfwid Arvid Mattsson. Ela faleceu em 1572, em sua cidade natal, com 90 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Britta Iversdotter родилась в 1482 г. в местности данмарк, уппсала, Швеция, её отцу по имени Iver Nilsson было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Okänd Hustru, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Arfwid Arvid Mattsson. Она умерла в 1572 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 90 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Britta Iversdotter nació en 1482, en Danmark, Uppsala, Suecia, su papá, Iver Nilsson, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Okänd Hustru, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Arfwid Arvid Mattsson. Murió en 1572, en su pueblo, a la edad de 90 años.
